name: Szechuan Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut it into 2-inch thick rounds.
2. Slice the rounds into wedges (similar to pizza slices).
3. Heat some water or broth in a non-stick pan.
4. Add the eggplant wedges and sauté, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through, about 3-5 minutes per side.
5. Remove the eggplant from the pan and add the scallions.
6. Mix the Hot Szechuan sauce and reduced sodium teriyaki sauce with cold water in a small bowl.
7. Pour the sauce mixture over the eggplant and stir to coat.
8. Serve hot over plain rice, adding additional water if desired due to the heat of the sauce.
